documentation.file_docstring: List all configured account IDs from the accounts field.
inline_comments: List all Feishu account IDs. If no accounts are configured, returns [DEFAULT_ACCOUNT_ID] for backward compatibility.
Backward compatibility: no accounts configured, use default
Resolve the default account selection and its source.
Merge top-level config with account-specific config. Account-specific fields override top-level fields.
Extract base config (exclude accounts field to avoid recursion)
Merge: account config overrides base config
Resolve Feishu credentials from a config.
In relaxed/setup paths only: allow direct env SecretRef reads for UX.
Default resolution path must preserve unresolved-ref diagnostics/policy semantics.
Resolve a complete Feishu account with merged config.
List all enabled and configured accounts.
